{{CargoRelic
|name=Bloodhoph Letter
|class_id=20216
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Rent from [[Lee Gi-na]]
|description=Dear Gi-na, I know you took our babies away because you can't stand my bad temper! It was all my fault. Please don't take it out on the kids! I've bought you a limited Ferrari! Please accept my sincere apology and come back...
Always Yours, Bull Chief
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=29
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 4 Never Lucky Packs claimed, Snail DEF +2<br>Never Lucky Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss2=Per 4 Never Lucky Packs claimed, Snail DEF +4<br>Never Lucky Packs Claimed: 40/40
|ss3=Per 4 Never Lucky Packs claimed, Snail DEF +6<br>Never Lucky Packs Claimed: 40/40
}}

[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Never Lucky Pack Boost]]
